title: Makes Boleto tax ID nullable in payment method details for Payment Records
raw_changelog: Makes Boleto tax ID nullable in payment method details for Payment Records. Previously the tax_id field was required. Now it can be null. Affected Products: All products. Breaking change: Non-breaking.
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
     "boleto": {
-      "tax_id": "string (required)",
+      "tax_id": "string or null",
       "fingerprint": "string"
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
-| tax_id | string | Yes | The tax ID of the customer |
+| tax_id | string or null | No | The tax ID of the customer. Can be null. |

ground_truth.action_required: Review code that reads Boleto tax_id field - it can now be null. Add null checks if not already present.
ground_truth.confidence_notes: Field changed from required to optional/nullable. Not breaking for request, but consumers parsing responses should handle null.
